vita: As a representative of the Aereth race in this vast galaxy, I have witnessed firsthand how trade can bridge gaps between different species. My people are skilled negotiators with an innate understanding that prosperity is shared when everyone benefits from commerce and cooperation.
portrait_prompt: A dignified human-like Aereth colonist commander in traditional Aereth attire, standing confidently before a holographic display of interstellar trade routes. The transparent background highlights the intricate network that represents our extensive connections across galaxies.
